stemHtml: One major advantage of the gridded forecasts is…

options.a: Data can be relayed by aircraft or pilot reports by being merged to onboard information processing systems.
options.b: Gridded forecasts are issued every 2 hours and cover a wide range of information.
options.c: Airborne meteorological stations provide real-time gridded weather information.
options.d: Pilots can issue their own gridded forecasts.
